clauses.text: grid is 20 columns by 20 rows 400 total cells
clauses.raw_text: The grid is 20 columns × 20 rows (400 total cells)

clauses.text: each cell is either empty or owned by a team color
clauses.raw_text: Each cell is either empty (null) or owned by a team color

clauses.text: initial grid state must be all empty cells
clauses.raw_text: Initial grid state must be all empty cells

clauses.text: grid state must be stored in memory no persistence needed
clauses.raw_text: Grid state must be stored in memory (no persistence needed)

clauses.text: there are exactly 4 teams red blue green and yellow
clauses.raw_text: There are exactly 4 teams: red, blue, green, and yellow

clauses.text: player team assigned round robin on join to keep teams balanced
clauses.raw_text: A player's team is assigned round-robin on join to keep teams balanced

clauses.text: team is all players sharing the same team color
clauses.raw_text: A "team" is defined as all players sharing the same team color

clauses.text: team scores are count of cells owned by that team color
clauses.raw_text: Team scores are the count of cells owned by that team's color

clauses.text: player paints cell by sending message with x y coordinates
clauses.raw_text: A player paints a cell by sending a message with {x, y} coordinates

clauses.text: painting must overwrite any existing cell color stealing territory allowed
clauses.raw_text: Painting must overwrite any existing cell color (stealing territory is allowed)

clauses.text: players must wait at least 500ms between paints cooldown
clauses.raw_text: Players must wait at least 500ms between paints (cooldown)

clauses.text: paints that violate cooldown must be rejected with too fast error
clauses.raw_text: Paints that violate the cooldown must be rejected with a "too_fast" error

clauses.text: out of bounds coordinates must be rejected with invalid cell error
clauses.raw_text: Out-of-bounds coordinates must be rejected with an "invalid_cell" error

clauses.text: every successful paint must be broadcast to all connected players immediately
clauses.raw_text: Every successful paint must be broadcast to all connected players immediately

clauses.text: round lasts 120 seconds
clauses.raw_text: A round lasts 120 seconds

clauses.text: server must broadcast remaining time every second
clauses.raw_text: The server must broadcast the remaining time every second

clauses.text: when timer reaches zero team with most cells wins
clauses.raw_text: When the timer reaches zero, the team with the most cells wins

clauses.text: after round ends server must broadcast final scores and winning team
clauses.raw_text: After a round ends, the server must broadcast the final scores and winning team

clauses.text: new round must start automatically 10 seconds after previous round ends
clauses.raw_text: A new round must start automatically 10 seconds after the previous round ends

clauses.text: grid must be reset to all empty cells at start of each new round
clauses.raw_text: The grid must be reset to all empty cells at the start of each new round

clauses.text: entire game ui is single html page served inline by game server no build tools no external assets everything embedded
clauses.raw_text: The entire game UI is a single HTML page served inline by the game server. No build tools, no external assets — everything is embedded.

clauses.text: page must have dark background 1a1a2e with grid centered
clauses.raw_text: The page must have a dark background (#1a1a2e) with the grid centered

clauses.text: above grid game title pixel wars and round timer showing mm ss countdown
clauses.raw_text: Above the grid: game title "⚔️ PIXEL WARS" and a round timer showing MM:SS countdown

clauses.text: below grid scoreboard showing each team color cell count and player count
clauses.raw_text: Below the grid: a scoreboard showing each team's color, cell count, and player count

clauses.text: player own team must be highlighted in scoreboard
clauses.raw_text: The player's own team must be highlighted in the scoreboard

clauses.text: grid must be rendered as html canvas element 500 by 500 pixels
clauses.raw_text: The grid must be rendered as an HTML Canvas element, 500×500 pixels

clauses.text: each cell is 25 by 25 pixels with 1px gap between cells
clauses.raw_text: Each cell is 25×25 pixels with a 1px gap between cells

clauses.text: empty cells must be rendered as dark gray 2a2a3e
clauses.raw_text: Empty cells must be rendered as dark gray (#2a2a3e)

clauses.text: owned cells must be rendered in team color with subtle glow effect
clauses.raw_text: Owned cells must be rendered in the team color with a subtle glow effect

clauses.text: cell under mouse cursor must show hover highlight
clauses.raw_text: The cell under the mouse cursor must show a hover highlight

clauses.text: clicking cell must send paint command to server
clauses.raw_text: Clicking a cell must send the paint command to the server

clauses.text: red team ff4757
clauses.raw_text: Red team: #ff4757

clauses.text: blue team 3742fa
clauses.raw_text: Blue team: #3742fa

clauses.text: green team 2ed573
clauses.raw_text: Green team: #2ed573

clauses.text: yellow team ffa502
clauses.raw_text: Yellow team: #ffa502

clauses.text: when player successfully paints cell it must flash white briefly
clauses.raw_text: When the player successfully paints a cell, it must flash white briefly

clauses.text: when paint rejected cooldown small wait toast must appear for 1 second
clauses.raw_text: When paint is rejected (cooldown), a small "⏳ wait" toast must appear for 1 second

clauses.text: when round ends full screen overlay must show color wins for 5 seconds
clauses.raw_text: When a round ends, a full-screen overlay must show "🏆 [COLOR] WINS!" for 5 seconds

clauses.text: player cooldown status must be shown as thin progress bar below grid
clauses.raw_text: The player's cooldown status must be shown as a thin progress bar below the grid

clauses.text: canvas must scale to fit viewport on mobile devices
clauses.raw_text: The canvas must scale to fit the viewport on mobile devices

clauses.text: touch events must work same as mouse clicks for painting
clauses.raw_text: Touch events must work the same as mouse clicks for painting

clauses.text: real time multiplayer pixel territory game players connect via websocket pick team color and paint cells on shared 20 by 20 grid team with most cells wins
clauses.raw_text: A real-time multiplayer pixel territory game. Players connect via WebSocket, pick a team color, and paint cells on a shared 20×20 grid. The team with the most cells wins.

clauses.text: all websocket messages use json format with type and payload fields
clauses.raw_text: All WebSocket messages use JSON format with `type` and `payload` fields

clauses.text: message structure is type string payload object
clauses.raw_text: Message structure is `{type: string, payload: object}`

clauses.text: the type field identifies the message kind state paint error timer winner players
clauses.raw_text: The `type` field identifies the message kind: "state", "paint", "error", "timer", "winner", "players"

clauses.text: on connection server sends type state message
clauses.raw_text: On connection, server sends `type: "state"` message

clauses.text: state payload includes playerid team grid teams timeremaining phase
clauses.raw_text: State payload includes: `playerId` (string), `team` (string), `grid` (array), `teams` (object), `timeRemaining` (number), `phase` (string)

clauses.text: grid is serialized as flat array of 400 elements 20 by 20 row major order values are null or team color strings
clauses.raw_text: Grid is serialized as flat array of 400 elements (20×20 row-major order), values are null or team color strings

clauses.text: client sends paint command as type paint payload x y
clauses.raw_text: Client sends paint command as `{type: "paint", payload: {x, y}}`

clauses.text: server broadcasts successful paint as type paint with payload x y color playerid
clauses.raw_text: Server broadcasts successful paint as `type: "paint"` with payload `{x, y, color, playerId}`

clauses.text: server sends errors as type error with payload code message
clauses.raw_text: Server sends errors as `type: "error"` with payload `{code, message}`

clauses.text: error codes include room_full too_fast invalid_cell round_not_active
clauses.raw_text: Error codes include: "room_full", "too_fast", "invalid_cell", "round_not_active"

clauses.text: server broadcasts type timer every second with payload timeremaining phase
clauses.raw_text: Server broadcasts `type: "timer"` every second with payload `{timeRemaining, phase}`

clauses.text: when round ends server broadcasts type winner with payload winner teams
clauses.raw_text: When round ends, server broadcasts `type: "winner"` with payload `{winner, teams}`

clauses.text: server broadcasts type players on join leave with payload total teams
clauses.raw_text: Server broadcasts `type: "players"` on join/leave with payload `{total, teams}`

clauses.text: server must handle websocket upgrade in http request handler not via upgrade event
clauses.raw_text: Server must handle WebSocket upgrade in the HTTP request handler, not via 'upgrade' event

clauses.text: server must access raw socket from http request and write upgrade response directly
clauses.raw_text: Server must access the raw socket from the HTTP request and write upgrade response directly

clauses.text: server must detect upgrade by checking req headers upgrade equals websocket in request handler
clauses.raw_text: Server must detect upgrade by checking `req.headers['upgrade'] === 'websocket'` in request handler

clauses.text: server must use raw tcp socket operations after upgrade not websocket library abstractions
clauses.raw_text: Server must use raw TCP socket operations after upgrade, not WebSocket library abstractions

clauses.text: server must implement raw websocket frame encoding without external libraries
clauses.raw_text: Server must implement raw WebSocket frame encoding/decoding without external libraries

clauses.text: outgoing text frames use format 0x81 length payload for unmasked frames
clauses.raw_text: Outgoing text frames use format: `[0x81, length, payload...]` for unmasked frames

clauses.text: incoming frames must parse masked payload using xor with 4 byte mask key
clauses.raw_text: Incoming frames must parse masked payload using XOR with 4-byte mask key

clauses.text: server must support frame length encoding 7 bit 16 bit 64 bit length prefixes
clauses.raw_text: Server must support frame length encoding: 7-bit (<126), 16-bit (126 prefix), 64-bit (127 prefix)

clauses.text: server must use only node js built in modules http crypto net
clauses.raw_text: Server must use only Node.js built-in modules (http, crypto, net)

clauses.text: server must not use external websocket libraries like ws or websocket
clauses.raw_text: Server must NOT use external WebSocket libraries like 'ws' or 'websocket'

clauses.text: http server and websocket must share same port using raw socket handling
clauses.raw_text: HTTP server and WebSocket must share the same port using raw socket handling

clauses.text: server must accept websocket connections on configurable port default 3000
clauses.raw_text: The server must accept WebSocket connections on a configurable port (default 3000)

clauses.text: same http server must serve game ui as single html page at get
clauses.raw_text: The same HTTP server must serve the game UI as a single HTML page at GET /

clauses.text: each connected player must be assigned unique player id random 6 character hex string
clauses.raw_text: Each connected player must be assigned a unique player_id (random 6-character hex string)

clauses.text: on connect server must send full grid state player list and remaining game time
clauses.raw_text: On connect, the server must send the full grid state, player list, and remaining game time

clauses.text: disconnected players must be removed from player list within 5 seconds
clauses.raw_text: Disconnected players must be removed from the player list within 5 seconds

clauses.text: server must broadcast updated player counts whenever someone joins or leaves
clauses.raw_text: The server must broadcast updated player counts whenever someone joins or leaves

clauses.text: server must support single global game room no room selection needed
clauses.raw_text: The server must support a single global game room (no room selection needed)

clauses.text: maximum 20 simultaneous players additional connections must receive room full error and be closed
clauses.raw_text: Maximum 20 simultaneous players; additional connections must receive a "room_full" error and be closed

clauses.text: server must track each player team color and total cells painted
clauses.raw_text: The server must track each player's team color and total cells painted
